zotero.abstractNote: We present 4D Object-Mover, a method for animating static 3D objects using pretrained diffusion priors. Given a single 3D object and a text prompt describing a motion, our method generates a 4D sequence of the object performing the motion. We leverage a pretrained video diffusion model as a motion prior and distill it into a 4D representation. To ensure temporal consistency and structural preservation, we introduce a novel motion-aware distillation loss and a structural guidance term. Our method produces high-quality, temporally consistent 4D animations from a single 3D input, outperforming existing baselines in both visual quality and motion fidelity.
